replies.msg:
小弟新手廢條一名

有經驗者可唔可以整篇深入淺出既教學？
Docker, CI哩d名聽過但實際點做？

點樣做automate哂d testing, 禁個掣就deploy想去， 縮短時間， 行agile, sprint果堆。

我知其然不知其以然， 望大師施教

小弟新手廢條一名

有經驗者可唔可以整篇深入淺出既教學？

我知其然而不知其所以然， 望大師施教
lm
香港有行devops 既公司都唔知有無十間

香港有行devops 既公司都唔知有無十間


就係咁先值得討論吧?

Tools for Monitoring – Nagios, NewRelic, Graphite etc.
Virtualization and Containerization Tools – Vagrant, VMware, Xen, Docker etc.
Tools for build, test and deployment – Jenkins, Maven, Ant, Travis, Bamboo, Teamcity etc.
For configuration Management – Puppet, Chef, Ubuntu Juju, Ansible, cfengine etc.
For Orchestration – Zookeeper, Noah etc.
For Cloud services – Azure, Openstack, Rackspace etc.


但見到哩d term 唔知點入手

完全唔識咩嚟, 但一咕狗下, 原來係類似AGILE果啲development workflow嚟!

咁其實如果你入到間公司要你follow呢隻workflow做嘢, 你到時就識架啦!

BTW, 等你入到呢啲公司先再開post問都未遲啦!
留名等高手
IBM用左9000幾年，香港無人用

香港有行devops 既公司都唔知有無十間


就係咁先值得討論吧?

Tools for Monitoring – Nagios, NewRelic, Graphite etc.
Virtualization and Containerization Tools – Vagrant, VMware, Xen, Docker etc.
Tools for build, test and deployment – Jenkins, Maven, Ant, Travis, Bamboo, Teamcity etc.
For configuration Management – Puppet, Chef, Ubuntu Juju, Ansible, cfengine etc.
For Orchestration – Zookeeper, Noah etc.
For Cloud services – Azure, Openstack, Rackspace etc.


但見到哩d term 唔知點入手

值得討論唔代表有人討論
香港識既人可能100個唔夠，有幾多人會上連登，就算有又幾多人得閒share

而加自己用緊既devops stack 係
on premise Gitlab + Gitlab CI, 成個CI/CD 都係Gitlab CI 做, backend push code 自動compile, test, build (docker image), deploy (k8s)
frontend 就CI去build UAT同submit/release app.

backend 就乜都係晒k8s入面, 係舒服既. logging 用返k8s跟機既elasticsearch+kibana, alert 就integrate左Opsgenie.

Am I missing something?

k8s 之類既container orchestration 我覺得係大趨勢. DevOps app metric opensource 可以睇下prometheus, 同Google internal 用緊既好相似

仲有k8s而加都有埋類似package manager 既野helm, 成個ecosystem 開始成熟. Docker 都講緊Open Containers Initiative

完全唔識咩嚟, 但一咕狗下, 原來係類似AGILE果啲development workflow嚟!

咁其實如果你入到間公司要你follow呢隻workflow做嘢, 你到時就識架啦!

BTW, 等你入到呢啲公司先再開post問都未遲啦!

唔係workflow, 係個mindset, 如果仲用緊"ops"既concept去manage個infar/system, 咁你唔係行緊"DevOps". "DevOps" 係去"Dev"一的野去幫你個"Ops". Google 係當中既表表者.

"Site Reliability Engineering: How Google Runs Production Systems"
依本書值得一睇

完全唔識咩嚟, 但一咕狗下, 原來係類似AGILE果啲development workflow嚟!

高手出現了!

Anyway, 照你咁講, DevOps應該又係mindset(i.e. idea), 又係workflow(i.e. process), 又係systems(i.e. implementation)了, 睇你用乜角度嚟講嘅啫!
